Container.Name: ddns-agent
Container.Overview: DDNS Agent is a lightweight, modern Dynamic DNS updater with an integrated web panel. It supports 50+ DNS providers and features a management interface with real-time log streaming, webhook notifications, and automatic IP change detection. Default login: username admin, password admin — change the password after first sign-in. Persistent file logging: /data/logs/agent.log (rotates daily to agent-YYYY-MM-DD.log; archive retention configurable in Settings).
Container.Description: DDNS Agent - Lightweight Dynamic DNS Updater with Web Panel. Default credentials: admin / admin (change after first login). Supports 50+ providers including Cloudflare, DuckDNS, GoDaddy, Hetzner, Namecheap, and more. Features: Real-time logs, webhook notifications, IPv4/IPv6, encrypted credentials, auto-backup. Writes /data/logs/agent.log with daily rotation; log archive retention is configurable in Settings.
Container.Changes: ### 1.0.2 - Persistent file log /data/logs/agent.log with daily rotation and 7-day archive retention ### 1.0.0 - Initial release - 52 DNS provider support - Web panel with dark/light theme - Real-time SSE log streaming - Webhook notifications (Discord, Telegram, Gotify, Generic) - Encrypted credential storage - Config export/import - Automatic database backups - Multi-language support (EN, DE)

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage: database, backups, encryption key, and /data/logs (agent.log)

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Fixed JWT secret for persistent sessions (auto-generated if empty)

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: AES-256 encryption key as 64 hex chars (auto-generated and saved to /data/.key if empty)
